description_long: This object is a cylindrical can with a bright red exterior and a black top, resembling a typical soft drink can. The can features large, bold white text that reads 'COCA-NA-COLA' in a stylized font, wrapping around the body. A white, wavy graphic element runs horizontally beneath the text, mimicking the iconic design of popular cola brands. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with a slight sheen, suggesting it is made of aluminum. The top of the can is flat and opaque, with no visible pull tab or opening mechanism. There are no visible dents, scratches, or additional markings on the can, giving it a clean and uniform appearance.
description: A red cylindrical can with bold white 'COCA-NA-COLA' text and a wavy white graphic, topped with a black lid. The surface is smooth and metallic, resembling a classic soda can.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'COCA-NA-COLA' text prominently and the white wavy graphic beneath it.
description_view_1: Side view with the text wrapping around, partially visible letters, and the continuation of the white wave.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the main text and wave graphic clearly on the can's body.
description_view_3: Side view with the text wrapping around, showing the opposite side of the can from view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: The can features a stylized 'COCA-NA-COLA' logo in large, white, wavy text wrapping around the red body. The logo is centrally located and dominates the can's surface.
